description_long: This is a rectangular 1-liter juice carton with a vibrant blue and orange color scheme, prominently featuring the Faragello brand logo and the word 'MANGO' in bold white letters. The front and back panels display images of ripe mango cubes with water droplets, suggesting a refreshing mango nectar inside. The side panels include detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages, as well as a barcode. The top of the carton is flat with a small, square, colored cap for pouring. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, typical for juice cartons, and is designed to be both lightweight and sturdy. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments.
description: A 1-liter Faragello mango juice carton with bright blue and orange graphics, mango imagery, and a small colored cap on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, 'MANGUE NECTAR PREMIUM' text, and vivid mango imagery.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional facts panel and multilingual product information.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with 'MANGO PREMIUM NECTAR' text and similar mango graphics as the main front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with ingredients and product details in multiple languages, plus a barcode at the bottom.
